Help & Guided Walkthroughs

    

      
Each feature has a short step-by-step walkthrough. New users see it automatically the first time they open that feature; turn any of them off here, or press Start to run one now.

      

    

    

      
      
    

  






  

    

      

        
        
        
      

      
    

    

      
Insert a standard screening form — questions, point values, severity bands, and risk alerts come prewired. Two groups are available below: scored screening forms, and unscored intake, assessment, and consent templates the patient fills out. Everything is fully editable after inserting.
